name: NOTE AB (publ)
summary: NOTE AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, provides electronics manufacturing services in Sweden, Finland, the United Kingdom, Estonia, China, and internationally. The company provides advanced production technology services in close collaboration with customers, such as component selection, developing test equipment, prototyping, and batch production, as well as after-sales services. It also produces PCBAs, sub-assemblies, and box build products. The company primarily serves the medtech, defense, manufacturing, communication, and consumer electronics industries. NOTE AB (publ) was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Kista, Sweden.
